annotations.title: Toward all the saints.
annotations.text: <mn>◦</mn> The Apostle sticketh not to say, Charity and faith in Christ and all his Saints, which our captious Adversaries count in Catholic men's speeches and writings, very absurd, feigning that in all such we make no difference betwixt the love we bear to Christ, and the love we owe to our neighbours: betwixt the trust or belief we have in God, and that which we have in his holy Saints. Malice and contention doth so blind all Heretics.
